calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Mitchell Wong, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2019 Continued To Apr-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Mitchell Wong, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to APR-09-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2018 Continued To Jan-08-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Mitchell Wong, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jan-08-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2018 Continued To Oct-30-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to OCT-30-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
